race.comment: Onto our feature of the day and it is wide open - basically none of these would shock and the market reflects that. WATCHME WIN (6) narrowly goes on top for us on resumption which is the best spot to find him. His first-up record is strong with 3 wins and a 2nd from 4 starts, that 2nd coming last preparation when just chinned by Super Smink as favourite. Neindorf should get him in a decent spot here trailing a hot speed and he's good enough to win. Speaking of good enough, BELLATRIX STAR (9) is the big query runner. She was a very good 3yo filly who has had multiple issues, tailing off at her only run last campaign. She's well suited here and has four jumpouts to build a base, respecting. MIRAVAL ROSE (10) resumes. 1100m is short of her best but she's a good mare who sprints well fresh and will be strong late. KLABEL (3) has form all around WATCHME WIN and goes in everything. WINNASEDGE (8) is up in grade but is rock-hard fit and could catch some of these on the hop.
